src/test/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace static import of String.format with the String.formatted() instance method introduced in Java 15.
src/test/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: While String.format still exists, the migration intent is to adopt modern Java APIs; however, strictly speaking, the old code compiles on Java 21. This is a stylistic modernization.
